pattern.description: A gitignore pattern is a glob-like expression that matches file paths. Supports *, **, ?, [...] character classes, and ! negation.

glob.description: A glob is a shell-style wildcard pattern. * matches any characters except /, ** matches across directories, ? matches a single character.

directory.description: A pattern ending with / only matches directories, not files.

negation.description: A pattern prefixed with ! negates the pattern so previously ignored files are re-included.

anchor.description: A leading / anchors the pattern to the directory containing the ignore file (typically the repository root).
